name: Dark Plugg
description: An underground subgenre emerging from the intersection of Atlanta plugg production and gothic/dark aesthetics. Characterized by minor-key melodies, lo-fi 808s, and a deliberately cold, detached vocal style. Mostly anonymous producers and artists operating outside traditional label structures.

lineage_roots.name: Plugg
lineage_roots.description: Parent genre — Atlanta production style with melodic 808s

lineage_roots.name: Rage
lineage_roots.description: Shared energy and distorted production palette
